sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Preposition / முன்னிடைச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A primary preposition; under, that is, (with the genitive) of place (beneath), or with verbs (the agency or means, through); (with the accusative) of place (whither [underneath] or where [below]) or time (when [at]): - among, by, from, in, of, under, with. In compounds it retains the same genitive applications, especially of inferior position or condition, and specifically covertly or moderately.
